---
title: "Research"
date-modified: today
listing: default
output-dir: docs
---

![](/images/Watershed_Lab_logo.png){fig-align="center" width="403"}

## Field Sites

Here's a map of the study sites where we draw observations from:

<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/d/embed?mid=1XhQxU5bQlNBSGpYkAbjyCuK1aHFK2Rk&amp;ehbc=2E312F" width="640" height="480">

</iframe>

## Funded Projects

<div>

#### **Taking the pulse of Québec's headwaters**

-   Lead researcher : Audrey Campeau
-   Funding sources: CRSNG/Conseil de recherches en sciences naturelles et génie du Canada (CRSNG)
-   Grant programs: PVXXXXXX-(DGECR) Tremplin vers la découverte
-   Duration: 2024-2030

</div>

<div>

#### CONTAC \| the carbon observatory network of the aquatic and terrestrial connectivity

-   Lead researcher: Audrey Campeau
-   Funding sources: FCI/Fondation canadienne pour l'innovation
-   Grant programs: John R. Evans Leaders Fund

</div>

<div>

#### **Ruisseaux Sentinelles: Révéler les Impacts à Long Terme des Feux de Forêt sur le Bilan Carbone des Forêts Canadiennes**

-   Lead researcher : Audrey Campeau
-   Funding sources: FRQNT/Fonds de recherche du Québec - Nature et technologies (FQRNT)
-   Grant programs: PVXXXXXX-(NC) Établissement de la relève professorale
-   Duration: 2025-2028

</div>

<div>

#### **Women in Science Award**

-   Lead researcher : Audrey Campeau
-   Funding sources: L'Oréal Sverige AB Sweden

</div>

<div>

#### **Inside the black box: assessing the stability of the greenhouse gases storage in northern peatland.**

-   Lead researcher : Audrey Campeau
-   Funding sources: Formas/Swedish Research Council for sustainable development
-   Grant programs: Mobility grant
-   Duration: 2020-2023

</div>

## Equipment & Infrastructure

### Geospatial toolkit

-   GNSS surveying system : [EMLID RS3](https://candrone.com/products/reach-rs3?srsltid=AfmBOoqj7ljre8LxEL7G-NxqbL4Qy1N_g6oqUYfQbxyS1hSq9v-WeJO-)

-   Ground based thermal imagery: [FLIR T560 camera](https://www.itm.com/product/flir-t560-professional-thermal-imaging-camera-89009-0101?gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=22931949025&gbraid=0AAAAAD39hO9HHjPoBZwkh_3B3pudbbutW&gclid=CjwKCAjw1tLOBhAMEiwAiPkRHk3RYHEI84yjhrxXUWKP03XVMW8bIGvvnXoWiLnDVZD2HJwAfW8ZqxoCt7YQAvD_BwE)

-   Ground based LIDAR scanner: [LiGrip O2 Lite](https://candrone.com/products/ligrip-02-lite?srsltid=AfmBOorbCBwDrdvJKeMxuOK9wpMDWvGL1sOgNV4Ai02nwS4YGy96GbF6)

### Hydrological observations

-   Acoustic doppler velocimeter: [FlowTracker 2 -ADV](https://hoskin.ca/fr/produit/flowtracker2-location/)

-   Pressure Transducers: [Hobo MX](https://shoponset.hoskin.ca/products/hobo-mx801-water-data-logger-copy)

-   Trail Cameras:

-   Underwater microphones: [Hydromoths](https://groupgets.com/products/hydromoth)

-   ICOS Water Isotope Analyzer

### Carbon sensing

-   Data loggers: Campbell Scientific

-   Oxygen: Mini-Do2T

-   CO2: Vaisala, C-sense and mini-sensors, in air (K33 sense air)

-   CH4: Pro-Oceanus, Solub-blue and mini sensors.

-   LGR: Ultraportable CO2 and CH4 analyzer
